channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: FAULT NOT FIXED Saturday 06/06/2026. Temporary roadworks traffic lights are dangerous as cyclists going uphill on green are met by traffic coming down who are released too early before cyclists can clear the long length of the roadworks. Traffic lights timing or sensors need fixing to protect safety of cyclists., 6th June
item.description:
FAULT NOT FIXED Saturday 06/06/2026. Temporary roadworks traffic lights are dangerous as cyclists going uphill on green are met by traffic coming down who are released too early before cyclists can clear the long length of the roadworks. Traffic lights timing or sensors need fixing to protect safety of cyclists.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stable Lane, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken and collapsed utility, 6th June
item.description:
The metal access cover on the

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Millfields Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive’FREE PALESTINE’ graffiti requires URGENT REMOVAL, 6th June
item.description:
I reported this approximately one month ago and still it is here along with other offensive graffiti!! I wonder if it would be removed within hours if anti-Islamic sentiments were scrawled over the top of it!!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Pothole Outside No 38, 6th June
item.description:
Large pothole - getting bigger please can you inspect and repair

item.title: 19 Melbourne Grove- Rose bush overgrown blocking pavement, 6th June
item.description:
The ruse bush from number 19 is completely block the pavement and pedestrians have to walk in the road to avoid it. It needs trimming/pinned back.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Melbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Path is dangerous, 6th June
item.description:
Reported but shut down as fixed- Its the whole path not just what was photographed last time. Theyve sectioned off only what was seen in last times photo. The whole path needs fixing. Not just shutting off!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stelling Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden pallets dumped, 6th June
item.description:
On small grass area end of gresham close and on pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gresham Close, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ford Transit abandoned for several weeks, 6th June
item.description:
A white Ford transit VRM SC19 RXG has been parked sticking into the road for around 2 weeks now. It’s untaxed and not MOT’d so unsure if it’s been dumped
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chandlers Drive, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
